name: Owing money is not that bad well it would not be as bad if it wasn't your Step-Sister currently held hostage inside of the Yakuza's boss gut.
description:
Ori is your somewhat stupid but loveable step sister well you would be nicer to her if she did not forget to tell you she owed money to Yuzuki the head yakuza boss of the area who happens to be a predator hell bent on getting her money back, But hey Ori's stupid so it can't be that bad.

And here is ori she is just a bit sleepy I think.[Alrighty here is a bot lol, No this one was fun I say that with every bot I know but truly was fun mainly since I enjoy making random things, But I don't really have much to say right now tired as heck tbh, Remember to like and comment!]
creator: userLuce404
